records.name: 070a - Email, Notifications, and External Handoffs - Send Homework Asset Payload to Make
records.conditions:
Conditions:
When
Send to Make Trigger is checked
and
Ready to Send to Make? contains READY_TO_SEND
and
Upload Status is Ready
and
Google Drive File URL is empty
and
Google Drive File ID is empty
and
Upload Destination is Homework Completions
and
Submission - Linked is not empty
and
Enrollment - Linked is not empty
and
Airtable Attachment is not empty
and
Homework Completions is not empty

and

and
Reviewed at is empty
XP Events is empty
Ready for XP Automation? is checked

and Upload Status is Ready
and Google Drive File URL is empty
and Google Drive File ID is empty
and Upload Destination is Video Feedback
and Submission - Linked is not empty
and Enrollment - Linked is not empty
and Airtable Attachment is not empty
and Video Feedback is not empty
